--- title: "Save a derived map with provenance" subtitle: "Write a tSNR map whose Receipt rides the file." jupyter: python3 sidebar: cookbook --- ## Goal Compute a masked temporal-SNR map and write it so the Receipt is embedded in the `.nii.gz` itself — no sidecar JSON, no manifest. ## Code ::: {#b97fc9d7 .cell execution_count=1} ``` {.python .cell-code} from pathlib import Path import sys import tempfile sys.path.insert(0, str(Path.cwd().parents[1] / "src")) import nibabel as nib import neuroim as ni repo = Path.cwd().parents[1] if Path.cwd().name == "cookbook" else Path.cwd() bold = ni.read_image(str(repo / "golden_tests/fixtures/tiny_bold.nii.gz")) mask = ni.read_image(str(repo / "golden_tests/fixtures/tiny_mask.nii.gz"), type="vol") tsnr = bold.temporal_snr(mask=mask) out = Path(tempfile.mkdtemp()) / "tsnr.nii.gz" nib.save(tsnr.to_nibabel(), str(out)) # Receipt embeds as NIfTI ecode-6 'comment' out.stat().st_size > 0, tsnr.provenance.method_name ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=1} ``` (True, 'temporal_snr') ``` ::: ::: ::: {.callout-note} `to_nibabel().save(...)` is the documented write path that embeds the Receipt. Use it when the file itself should explain which operation, input image, and mask produced the map. ::: ## What's guaranteed - The mask/BOLD frame is validated inside `temporal_snr` before the reduction runs. - `to_nibabel()` writes exactly one `neuroim/receipt/v1:` extension, replacing any prior one; foreign `comment` extensions are untouched. ## What survives the file The eight Receipt fields, byte-identical, in a NIfTI `comment` extension (`ecode 6`), recoverable by [ten lines of `nibabel` alone](../spec/receipt-nifti-extension.html): ::: {#fc1e3f13 .cell execution_count=2} ``` {.python .cell-code} import json img = nib.load(str(out)) ext = next(e for e in img.header.extensions if int(e.get_code()) == 6) text = bytes(ext.get_content()).rstrip(b"\x00").decode("utf-8") receipt = json.loads(text[len("neuroim/receipt/v1:"):]) sorted(receipt) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=2} ``` ['input_space_hash', 'mask_hash', 'method_name', 'n_voxels', 'neuroim_version', 'radius', 'seed', 'source_affine_hash'] ``` ::: ::: ## Trapdoors ::: {#981daa55 .cell execution_count=3} ``` {.python .cell-code} from neuroim.neuro_space import NeuroSpace wrong = NeuroSpace(tuple(mask.space.dim), spacing=(9, 9, 9)) bold.temporal_snr(mask=ni.DenseNeuroVol(mask.data, wrong)) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-error} ::: {.ansi-escaped-output} ```{=html}

``` ::: ::: ::: A wrong-frame mask raises `ValueError` (`spatial contract mismatch`) before any numeric work — the failed call leaves the BOLD untouched. ## See also - [Start 05 — Round-trip](../start/05-roundtrip.qmd) - [Spec: Receipt NIfTI extension](../spec/receipt-nifti-extension.html) - [Concept: Provenance](../concepts/provenance.qmd)
